title: Tal (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Tala}}
'''Tal''' can refer to:

==Individuals==
*[[Tal (Jedi)|Tal]], a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].
*[[Tal (nurse)|Tal]], a [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
*[[Tal (Taris)|Tal]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] worker on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].
*[[Tal Anavere]], a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]].
*[[Tal Ashen]], an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[General/Legends|general]].
*[[Tal Fraan]], a [[Yevetha]]n [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctor]].
*[[Tal Hesz]], a [[Jabiimi]] resistance leader.
*[[Tal Merrik/Legends|Tal Merrik]], a [[Senator/Legends|senator]].
*[[Tal Pak]], a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].
*[[Tal-lik-Tal]], a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] employee of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].

==Other==
*[[Tal (creature)|Tal]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] kept as pets on [[Yalln]].
*[[Tal gum]], a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] substance.
*[[Tal Nami]], a planet in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].
**The [[Tal Nami (species)|Tal Nami]] species.
*''Tal'', the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word for "[[Blood/Legends|blood]]."

{{Disambig}}

|de=Tal
}}
